name: Woodworking
description: Craft wooden structures, furniture, and components from harvested timber. Woodworkers produce building pieces, tool handles, and the versatile Wood Slurry intermediate used in advanced construction.

nodes.name: Woodworking
nodes.description: Foundation of the Woodworking profession. Grants access to basic wood crafting recipes. Use the Xyloslicer to harvest timber from trees across all biomes.

nodes.name: Wood Slurry
nodes.description: Craft Wood Slurry — a processed pulp intermediate made from raw wood. Used in advanced building recipes and as a binding agent in composite construction materials.

nodes.name: Structural Lumber
nodes.description: Mill harvested wood into dimensional lumber suitable for load-bearing structures. Unlocks hardwood and softwood building pieces at the Lathe.

nodes.name: Bamboo Craft
nodes.description: Work with Bamboo — a fast-growing grass that yields lightweight structural components. Bamboo pieces have high versatility stats compared to other wood types.

nodes.name: Furniture
nodes.description: Craft decorative and functional furniture pieces for homesteads. Precise furniture recipes are under active development.

nodes.name: Fine Woodcraft
nodes.description: Master woodworking techniques using Dark Hard Wood and Light Hard Wood. Produces high-PQRV wooden components with superior quality and resilience stats.

nodes.name: Composite Materials
nodes.description: Combine Wood Slurry with metals or stone to produce composite building materials. Unlocks hybrid building piece recipes with improved structural properties.
